name: Adobo (Mexican Smoked Chile Marinade)
recipeIngredient: 2-3 Canned Chipotle Chilies - or to taste
recipeInstructions:
Source: FOODday, July 9, '91
From: Valerie Whittle
This spicy marinade owes its unusual flavor to the chipotle, a smoked jalapeno chile. Chipotles are usually sold canned in tomato paste. Look for them at Mexican and Latin American markets. Adobo marinade goes particularly well with pork.
1. Juice the oranges and lime.
2. Finely chop the chilies and garlic.
3. Combine citrus juices, chilies, garlic, oregano, cumin, black pepper, vinegar, and salt in a blender.
4. Puree until smooth.
5. Makes enough marinade for 1 1/2 to 2 pounds of meat or chicken.
